rationale: CRUD spec requires update_many as a Collection method; ticket implements this missing required spec behavior.
CRUD spec requires replace_one as a Collection method; ticket implements this missing required spec behavior.
Depends on DRIVERS-214; spec requires TLS cert verification by default when ssl=true; driver skipped verification.
API ergonomics improvement for per-connection logging; no spec rule involved.
Driver raises error on unknown URI options; connection-string spec requires graceful handling, not process termination.
Error wrapping improvement for ECONNREFUSED; no specific spec rule violated.
Depends on DRIVERS-230; SDAM spec requires removing RS member whose 'me' field doesn't match connection address.
New user-management API convenience method; no spec coverage.
Ruby encoding mismatch in GridFS/BSON; Ruby-specific encoding implementation bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
1.x reconnect incorrectly aliased for replica sets; internal implementation bug, no spec rule cited.
Socket read timeout regression in 1.12.x; performance/reliability issue, no spec rule violated.
BSON::Binary encoding bug using encode instead of force_encoding; Ruby-specific implementation bug.
Client doesn't fallback from IPv6 to IPv4; implementation bug with no spec rule governing protocol family retry.
BulkWrite silently swallows write-concern failures instead of raising; spec requires errors to be raised.
Client#with options bleed into subsequent operations; internal state mutation bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Per-client logger assignment; API ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.
parallel_scan ignores find filter; implementation bug in non-spec-defined API method.
Unix socket connection fails; platform feature bug, no spec rule governing socket types.
Read preference hash not converted to ServerSelector object; internal Ruby implementation bug.
Depends on SPEC-198; GridFS spec says not to run filemd5 to verify upload; driver was running it unnecessarily.
Adding test cases for empty-file GridFS upload edge case; about adding tests, not fixing driver behavior.
GridFS spec requires files doc inserted after all chunks; driver was inserting it before chunks.
GridFS spec requires GridFSBucket to accept configurable write concern; driver lacked this.
GridFS spec requires GridFSBucket to accept configurable read preference; driver lacked this.
GridFS spec defines 'GridFSBucket' and 'bucket_name'; driver used non-spec names 'fs' and 'fs_name'.
GridFS spec defines find returning file documents with options; driver returned assembled file from first match only.
GridFS spec requires open_download_stream method; driver was missing this required spec method.
GridFS spec requires upload_from_stream method; driver was missing this required spec method.
GridFS spec requires open_upload_stream method; driver was missing this required spec method.
GridFS spec requires download_to_stream method; driver was missing this required spec method.
Depends on DRIVERS-255; SCRAM spec requires constant-time comparison for server signature; driver used direct equality.
Implementing new GridFS spec support; driver lacked the revised GridFS API defined by spec.
GridFS spec requires index on {filename:1, uploadDate:1} on files collection; driver was not creating it.
CRUD spec allows write concern per operation; driver only supported write concern at client level.
Internal special-selector whitelist bug in View::Readable; no spec rule governing this behavior.
Server selection spec defines retry scenarios; driver was missing required retry behaviors on socket and not-master errors.
Ruby encoding mismatch when querying unicode collection names; Ruby-specific encoding bug, no spec rule violated.
Windows platform crash on UNIXSocket constant; platform compatibility bug, no spec involvement.
NoMethodError on read_preference returning String instead of Hash; internal implementation bug.
BSON::Document#merge mutates receiver array elements; Ruby-specific behavior bug, no BSON spec rule involved.
SIGINT corrupts BSON registry state making client unusable; signal-handling implementation bug.
Nil socket reference prevents reconnect after server restart; internal implementation bug, no specific SDAM rule cited.
SSL error causes permanent connection failure; reconnect implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Driver misidentifies user documents with 'ok' field as command responses; implementation bug, no spec rule about user document fields.
BSON spec requires little-endian encoding; native C code used wrong byte order on big-endian platforms.
BSON native code fails on big-endian platforms; BSON spec requires correct little-endian serialization regardless of platform.
Driver raises OperationFailure for user documents containing 'errmsg' field; implementation error detection bug.
Change default log level from DEBUG to INFO; logging ergonomics, no spec involvement.
BSON::Document#merge yields for non-duplicate keys, violating Ruby Hash#merge semantics; Ruby API compatibility bug.
Cannot query current operations on sharded cluster via $cmd.sys.inprog; implementation bug, no spec coverage.
